creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
As it was in the bug
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222429
www/chromium source make an assumption that we use www/jpeg-turbo, but we can have  a liberty of using www/jpeg.
So, during compilation several lines in SkJpegCodec.cpp should be hidden by
#ifdef JSC_EXTENSIONS
